message:

@@ -0,0 +1,90 @@ +/** + * Simple CSS-based globe visualization (fallback for Three.js globe) + * Much lighter weight - no external dependencies + */ +import { useState } from 'react' + +interface SimpleGlobeProps { + className?: string +} + +export function SimpleGlobe({ className = '' }: SimpleGlobeProps) { + const [clusters] = useState(() => + Array.from({ length: 12 }, (_, i) => ({ + id: i, + x: Math.random() * 100, + y: Math.random() * 100, + delay: Math.random() * 3, + })) + ) + + return ( +
+ {/* Globe sphere */} +
+ {/* Main globe circle with gradient */} +
+ {/* Rotating ring animation */} +
+
+ + {/* Cluster dots */} + {clusters.map((cluster) => ( +
+ {/* Ripple effect */} +
+
+ ))} + + {/* Connection lines (simplified) */} + + + {/* Glow effect */} +
+
+ + {/* Orbital rings */} +
+
+
+ + {/* Title */} +
+

Multi-Cluster Management

+

Visualize and control your Kubernetes infrastructure

+
+
+ ) +}

{/* Subtle gradient background for the globe side */}
- -

- }> - - +
{/* Version info - bottom right */}

@@ -0,0 +1,49 @@ +/** + * Lightweight code block component + * Replaces react-syntax-highlighter to reduce bundle size (saves ~612KB) + */ +import { useState } from 'react' +import { Copy, Check } from 'lucide-react' + +interface CodeBlockProps { + children: string + language?: string + fontSize?: 'sm' | 'base' | 'lg' +} + +export function CodeBlock({ children, language = 'text', fontSize = 'sm' }: CodeBlockProps) { + const [copied, setCopied] = useState(false) + + const handleCopy = async () => { + try { + await navigator.clipboard.writeText(children) + setCopied(true) + setTimeout(() => setCopied(false), 2000) + } catch (err) { + console.error('Failed to copy:', err) + } + } + + return ( +
+
+ +
+ 
+        
+          {children}
+        
+
+
+ ) +}
